California
Fair POlitical
Practices Cornrnission
」anuary 
■6, ■992
AI Runpilla
Diamond Bar cadfly Assn.
23958 colden Springs Drive
Diamond Bar, CA 9L7 65
RE: Your Request for Advice
Our FiIe No. A-91-5 58
Dear Mr. Rumpi].Ia:
You have requested assistance on behalf of the Diamond Bar
cadfly Association (the "Associationtt) under the campaign
provisions of the Political 
Reform Act (the "Actr').r/
OUESTION
Does receipt of a video, which features issues of cornmunity
concern, require the Association to file campai-gn disclosure
statements under the Act?
CONCLUSION
Receipt of the video is not a contribution under the Act and
does not require the Association to file canpaign discJ.osure
statements.
FACTS
The Diamond Bar Gadfly Association i.s an informaL association
made up of Diarnond Bar residents. 
The Association attends council-
meetings and monitors city activities. 
The Association does not
naintain bank accounts, collect dues, solicit contributions or
conduct fundraisers. The Association recently received a video
which neither supports a candidate nor any election issue (no
indivj.duals are rnentioned). The video features a general plan and
identifies several issues of concern to the communj-ty.'
l/ 
covernment code Sections 81ooo-91915. AII statutory
references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated.
Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regul-ations
Section r8ooo, et seq. AII references to reguJ.aticns are to Title
2, Division 6 of the california code ol Regulations.
ヽ

ANALYSI S
The Act requires "comnittees" to register and file periodic
campaign disclosure reports. 
(Sections 841-00, et seq- ) A
"committee" is def i-ned in part as any person or combination of
persons $rho directly or indirectly receives contributions totaling
51,OoO or more in a calendar year. (Section 82013(a) -)
A "contribution" is any rnonetary or nonmonetary payment nade
for political 
purposes for which fulI and adequate consideration
is not made to the donor. (Section 82015.) A paynent is rnade for
political 
purposes if it is:
For the purpose of influencing or attenpting to
influence the action of the voters for or against the
nomination or election of a candidate or candidates,
or the qualificati-on or passage of any measure .. -.
Regulation L8215.
Because the video does not support or oppose candidates or
ba1lot measures, it does not meet the Act's definition of
',pol5,tica} purposetr and, therefore, receipt of the video is not a
contribution to the Association. Because the Association does not
receive contributions in any other form and has not nade any
campaign expenditures, the Association does not qualify as
cornrnittee and has no filing requi.rements under the Act at this
time. However, if the Association provides the video to
officeholders, candidates, or committees, it rnay incur carnpaign
filing obligations in the future.
I hope the above inforrnation has answered your concerns. If
you have any additional. questions please feel free to contact me
at (916) 322-s662.
SincereIY,
Scott Hallabrin
Acting General counsel
